# Scene Contract: CH001_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the narrative framing device by introducing an elderly protagonist who is documenting his life history. The scene must communicate his anomalous aging process and his impending mortality through a solemn, introspective tone.

## Required Cast
- john_carter (Elderly)

## Required Environments
- Unspecified (Narrative framing space)

## Continuity Constraints
- Consistent elderly age/appearance for john_carter
- Consistent tone of voice and delivery

- BT001: Visual introduction of anomalous aging via texture
- BT002: Verbal introduction of self and condition
- BT003: Declaration of intent to document life

## Production Intent
Establish the supernatural threat of the cave through auditory and psychological terror, forcing a chaotic retreat of the Apache warriors.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- apache_warriors

## Required Environments
- rocky_gorge_canyon (cave_mouth, canyon_floor, rocky_ledge)

## Continuity Constraints
- Distance between apache_warriors and cave mouth during approach.
- Precise timing of the moaning sound relative to character reaction/freeze.
- Direction of retreat for warriors during panic.

- BT001: Apache warriors approach the cave entrance.
- BT002: A terrifying low moaning sound emanates from the depths.
- BT003: Warriors flee in panic; one falls to his death.

purpose: To execute the central supernatural twist and reveal the protagonist's transformation.
summary: After hours of isolation, the protagonist uses intense mental willpower to break the paralysis. Upon standing, he realizes he has undergone a metamorphosis: his new, naked self stands upright while his original, clothed body remains lying lifeless on the cave floor.
emotional_arc: From intense mental struggle to profound shock and existential horror.
production_intent: Execute the supernatural metamorphosis reveal by transitioning from a physical struggle against paralysis to the visual discovery of two distinct versions of the protagonist. The shot must capture the spatial relationship between the standing naked figure and the lifeless clothed body within the deep shadows of the cave.

scene_end_state: Protagonist stands naked, staring down at his own clothed corpse.

old body lies motionless on the cave floor in proximity to the new self

# Scene Contract: CH002_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute the central supernatural twist and reveal the protagonist's metamorphosis. The scene must transition from intense physical struggle to the existential horror of discovering a lifeless, clothed version of oneself lying on the cave floor while standing naked.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (The "New" Self)
- old_body (The "Old" Body/Clothed corpse)

## Required Environments
- arizona_mountain_cave (Deep shadows, rocky floor)

## Continuity Constraints
- Spatial relationship between the standing naked protagonist and the lying clothed body.
- Lighting consistency across both versions of the character in the same frame.

## Beat List
- BT001: Intense mental struggle to break paralysis.
- BT002: Metamorphosis/standing upright as a new, naked self.
- BT003: Realization and existential horror upon seeing the old body.

Establish the protagonist's physical vulnerability and the alien physics of Mars through disorienting movement. The visual language must contrast the vastness of the Martian landscape with the intimate, clumsy struggle of a naked subject in low gravity.

- protagonist

Establish the biological reality of Martian life through a transition from scientific curiosity to visceral horror. The visual language must contrast the sterile, protective glass of the incubator with the grotesque, multi-limbed movement of the hatchlings and the stillness of large white eggs.

Establish the scale and lethality of the Martian warrior force through a high-tension encounter. The sequence must contrast the protagonist's small, hidden presence against the rhythmic, heavy movement of twenty mounted warriors passing in close proximity.

- martian_warriors (20 riders)

- Physical distance between spear tip and protagonist during pass

The protagonist executes a high-stakes physical escape via a thirty-foot leap across the circular_moss_basin. This movement must visually demonstrate superhuman capability to shift the martian_warriors from hunters to observers of a discovery.

## Production Intent
Execute a high-tension diplomatic exchange through non-verbal cues and physical tokens. The sequence must transition from the stillness of a standoff to the kinetic movement of a departing cavalcade across the Martian basin.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- The Leader
- martian_warriors

## Required Environments
- circular_basin (yellowish mossy vegetation)
- martian_distant_hills

## Continuity Constraints
- Metal armlet must remain visible on protagonist's arm after acceptance
- Height differential between protagonist and Martian mount during lifting process

## Beat List
- BT001: The Leader dismounts unarmed to approach the protagonist
- BT002: The exchange of the metal armlet
- BT003: The protagonist is lifted onto a Martian mount and departs
